docs.title: Home
docs.text:
Bakeology

Sweet goods to sweeten up your taste buds!

Welcome to Bakeology, where every loaf, pastry, and cake is crafted with care. From fresh-baked breads to custom celebration cakes, our goal is to bring people together through quality ingredients and timeless recipes.

Browse our selection of artisan breads, handcrafted pastries, and custom cakes to find the perfect treat for any occasion.

docs.title: About
docs.text:
Bakeology began with a simple passion: creating fresh baked goods that taste as good as they look. We believe that great baking starts with quality ingredients, patience, and attention to detail.

Whether you're stopping by for a morning pastry, ordering a birthday cake, or picking up a fresh loaf of bread, we're committed to providing products that make every day a little sweeter.

docs.title: Fresh Artisan Breads
docs.text:
Our breads are crafted using traditional techniques, quality ingredients, and plenty of patience. From rustic sourdough loaves to soft sandwich breads, each loaf is baked to bring warmth and flavor to your table.

Artisan Loaf

Handcrafted bread with a crisp crust and soft, airy interior, baked fresh daily.

Blueberry Sourdough

Slow-fermented dough with a tangy flavor and perfectly chewy texture.

Jalapeno Sourdough

Slow-fermented dough with a tangy flavor and perfectly chewy texture.

Sourdough

Slow-fermented dough with a tangy flavor and perfectly chewy texture.

docs.title: Cakes
docs.text:
Our cakes are made to celebrate life's special moments. We offer classic flavors, custom designs, and seasonal creations for birthdays, weddings, anniversaries, and more.

Raspberry Chocolate Cheesecake

A rich, velvety cheesecake layered with deep chocolate and swirled with vibrant raspberry.

Chocolate Fudge Cake

Rich chocolate fudge layer cake with glossy frosting and decorative piping on a serving plate

Vanilla Bean Cake

Classic vanilla bean cake with smooth frosting and subtle decorative accents in a bakery display

Raspberry Cheese Cake

Raspberry cheesecake topped with fresh berries on a light-colored plate in a bright setting

Red Velvet Cake

Red velvet cake with cream cheese frosting displayed on a white cake stand and warm cozy atmosphere

Lemon Raspberry Cake

A light and refreshing cake infused with bright lemon flavor and layered with sweet-tart raspberry filling.

Strawberry Short Cake

Strawberry shortcake layered with whipped cream and ripe strawberries on a rustic serving platter

docs.title: Gallery
docs.text:
Take a look at some of our favorite creations. From custom celebration cakes to fresh pastries and artisan breads, every item is made with attention to detail and a passion for baking.

Fresh home made Red or Green chilli tomales

docs.title: Handcrafted Pastries
docs.text:
From flaky croissants to sweet danishes and seasonal favorites, our pastries are baked fresh and made with quality ingredients.

Heart Shaped Pastries

Flaky, golden pastry with a rich buttery finish. Classic comforting finish with every bite.

Macaroons

Crisp on the outside with a soft, chewy center, these delicate treats are filled with smooth, flavorful cream.

Filled Pastry

Soft and rich with a lightly crisp edge, this pastry delivers a classic, comforting sweetness with every bite.

Light Puff Pastry

Light, airy pastry with a delicate texture and subtle sweetness, perfect for a soft and satisfying bite.

Pastry Assortment - Catered Event

An assortment of handcrafted pastries presented together, offering a variety of textures and flavors to enjoy in one selection.
